name: the-sum-of-us
description: Heather McGhee's 'The Sum of Us: What Racism Costs Everyone and How We Can Prosper Together' — a groundbreaking look at how racism hurts everyone and how cross-racial solidarity creates prosperity for all.
useCase: Understand how racism hurts people of all races, learn about the solidarity dividend, and find hope in stories of cross-racial cooperation.
knownRisks: States a strong thesis about racism's economic costs — may challenge readers who disagree
Policy-focused — some readers may prefer more personal narratives
US-specific — primarily about American racial dynamics
